Usage: <tt>%1superpaste NUM_OF_ENTRIES[i]</tt>

<tt>%1superpaste 7</tt> for the last 7 entries

. Notes for Zerochan:\n- You must enter:
. Notes for Zerochan:
- You must enter a color
- Set your zerochan username in `sidebar.booru.zerochan.username` config option. You [might be banned for not doing so](https://www.zerochan.net/api#:~:text=The%20request%20may%20still%20be%20completed%20successfully%20without%20this%20custom%20header%2C%20but%20your%20project%20may%20be%20banned%20for%20being%20anonymous.)!

Remember that on most devices one can al:
Remember that on most devices one can always hold the power button to force shutdown
This only makes it a tiny bit harder for accidents to happen
When enabled keeps the content of the ri:
When enabled keeps the content of the right sidebar loaded to reduce the delay when opening,
at the cost of around 15MB of consistent RAM usage. Delay significance depends on your system's performance.
Using a custom kernel like linux-cachyos might help
Enjoy! You can reopen the welcome app an: Enjoy! You can reopen the welcome app any time with <tt>Super+Shift+Alt+/</tt>. To open the settings app, hit <tt>Super+I</tt>

and the remaining area can be used for volume/brightness scroll
